description:
Legal record (#63) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 16v of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated in the first third of Av 5443 AM, which is 1683 CE. 

(Document #63) Rental and subletting agreement for an upper-story apartment in al-Saqāliba neighborhood (of Cairo). The apartment is held in a partnership by Avraham b. Yehuda Tipa and Shalom b. Moshe Jaʿbās. Each partner agrees to pay the other partner 25 medin per month for full usage of the property, whether it be for their own residence or in order to sublet the apartment. Shalom agrees to pay Avraham for usage of the property during the first year, and then relinquish control over the apartment in order for Avraham to reside there or to sublet it for the second year. This document is directly referenced in the first entry of the fragment AIU VII.D.57 (PGPID 30553), which is a missing bifolio and join with BL OR 6356.1-16. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
